description: 修复画布状态丢失和图形绘制 Bug，新增 PNG 导出、画布清空、深/浅色模式切换、缩放与撤销/重做控制组件。

userStories.title: Fix shapes disappearing after draw completion
userStories.description: As a user, I want shapes to persist on the canvas after I finish drawing them so that my work is not lost.
acceptanceCriteria: handleMouseUp correctly creates newShape and pushes it into shapes array
pushHistory([...shapes, newShape]) is called for all shape types
redrawCanvas is triggered after shapes state update
All shape types (rectangle, ellipse, rhombus, line, arrow, freehand, image, text) persist after mouseUp
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser: draw each shape type and confirm it stays on canvas after mouse release

userStories.title: Fix tool buttons not drawing shapes
userStories.description: As a user, I want all tool buttons to correctly activate their drawing mode so I can draw any shape I choose.
acceptanceCriteria: All tool button onClick handlers correctly call onToolChange to set activeTool
CanvasComponent handleMouseDown/handleMouseMove/handleMouseUp have branches for all tool types
Shortcut key mappings complete in App.tsx: V=Select, R=rectangle, O=ellipse, D=rhombus, L=line, A=arrow, P=freehand, I=image, X=eraser
Rectangle, ellipse, rhombus, line, arrow, freehand, eraser, image all draw correctly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Export canvas to PNG
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save the canvas as a PNG image so that I can share or archive my whiteboard content.
acceptanceCriteria: Add save button in UnifiedToolbar row 2 (icon: download)
Clicking save exports all shapes' minimum bounding box + 20px padding as .png
Triggers browser native download via canvas.toBlob() + <a download>
Exported image includes all visible shapes, strokes, text, images
Exported image background matches current theme (light/dark)
Default filename format: whiteboard-{roomId}-{timestamp}.png
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Clear canvas with stable undo support
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear the entire canvas with one click and be able to undo it reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add trash icon button in UnifiedToolbar row 2
Clicking clears all shapes (no confirmation dialog)
Before clearing, pushes complete current state snapshot to history stack
Ctrl+Z or undo button restores canvas to pre-clear state in one step
selectedIds reset to empty after clear
WebSocket: broadcasts all shape deletions to other users
Multiple clear + undo/redo cycles do not corrupt state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Light/dark theme toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to switch between light and dark canvas modes so I can work comfortably in different lighting conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add sun (light) and moon (dark) toggle buttons in UnifiedToolbar row 2
Light mode: canvas background #FFFFFF
Dark mode: canvas background #121212
Toolbar background, button colors, text colors adapt to current theme
Stroke colors inverted via render-time color mapping (not CSS filter): #000000 becomes #E0E0E0 in dark mode
All existing and new shapes update immediately on theme switch
PNG export background and stroke colors match current theme
Theme state in App.tsx (not persisted, defaults to light on refresh)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Zoom in/out buttons in bottom-right panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want zoom in/out buttons at the bottom-right corner so I can easily control the canvas scale.
acceptanceCriteria: Capsule-shaped zoom control group in bottom-right floating panel
Layout: [-] shrink → percentage text → [+] enlarge
Click + zooms in by 25% step
Click - zooms out by 25% step
Zoom range: min 10%, max 500%
Percentage text updates in real time (e.g. 25%, 50%, 100%, 150%)
Zoom center is current viewport center
Mouse coordinate mapping remains accurate after zoom (screenToWorld correct)
Existing mouse wheel zoom still works alongside buttons
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Undo/redo buttons in bottom-right panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want undo/redo buttons at the bottom-right corner so I can easily navigate my editing history.
acceptanceCriteria: Undo (left curved arrow) and redo (right curved arrow) buttons in bottom-right panel next to zoom controls
Undo button reverts to previous canvas state; disabled when history is empty
Redo button restores after undo; cleared on new draw/edit action
Uses existing history and forwardHistory stacks for state snapshots
Button behavior matches existing Ctrl+Z (undo) and Ctrl+Y (redo) shortcuts
selectedIds cleared on undo/redo
Clear canvas action can be fully restored with one undo
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
